# Rideout Plumbing

> Veteran-owned, family-run plumbing company serving Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas since 1981. 4.8★ on Google with 178 reviews. Owner: Jason Rideout.

## Business

- **Name:** Rideout Plumbing (formerly Julian's Plumbing)
- **Owner:** Jason Rideout, President & Master Plumber
- **Founded:** 1981 (45+ years in business)
- **Type:** Veteran-owned, family-run small business
- **License:** NC Plumbing License #21504
- **BBB:** A+ rated, accredited since 2024
- **Phone:** (704) 375-0780
- **Address:** 4224 Park Rd, Charlotte, NC 28209
- **Hours:** 24/7 including emergency service
- **Rating:** 4.8★ / 178 Google reviews

## Services

- Kitchen & Bath Plumbing (toilets, tubs, showers, faucets, sinks, garbage disposals, dishwashers)
- Drain & Pipe Cleaning
- Slab & Yard Leak Detection and Repair
- Water & Sewer Line Repair and Replacement
- Water Filtration Systems
- Water Heater Installation and Repair (traditional & tankless)

## Value Propositions

- Same-day service available
- Flat-rate, upfront honest pricing
- 1-year warranty on all work
- 24/7 emergency response
- Small team = consistent, accountable service

## Service Area

Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas including South Charlotte, Matthews, Pineville, Ballantyne, and neighboring communities.

## Team

- **Jason Rideout** — Owner & Master Plumber
- **Chason** — Plumber
- **Jeff** — Plumber
- **Dixie** — Bulldog mascot (Chief Morale Officer)

## Customer Reviews (Sample)

- "Awesome! Honest and efficient! Came the same day to fix my bathtub!" — Nikki J.
- "I've been working with Jason and his team for nearly 10 years. Rideout always delivers." — Kevin J.
- "To have someone be that responsive in my time of need was priceless." — Matthew R.

## Site

- **Demo URL:** https://rideoutplumbing.nule.io
- **Built by:** Nule & Co
- **Purpose:** Pitch/demo redesign to show Jason Rideout what a modern site could look like
